note:
Appends a:r inside a:p. Font properties live on a:rPr. Colors get #-prefixed on readback via ParseHelpers.FormatHexColor.

effective.* keys (size, font, color, bold) are read-only resolved values walked up the placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults inheritance chain. They appear only when the direct key is absent on this run; once a direct value is set, the corresponding effective.* is suppressed. There is no effective.direction on runs (the implementation does not emit it). No .src counterparts.

underline.description: underline style. Common values: single, double, dotted, dash, wave, none.

effective.size.description: inheritance-resolved font size (read-only). Surfaced when the run does not set 'size' directly; resolved through run style â†’ paragraph style â†’ docDefaults.

effective.font.description: resolved font name inherited from placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'font' is set directly on the run.

effective.color.description: resolved text color inherited from placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'color' is set directly on the run.

effective.bold.description: resolved bold inherited from placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'bold' is set directly on the run.
